prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the unified alerting (ngalert) subsystem: the alert rule storage, the scheduler, the state manager, the notifier, and the history writer. Map the major components and their interactions.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the unified alerting (ngalert) subsystem: the alert rule storage, the scheduler, the state manager, the notifier, and the history writer. Map the major components and their interactions.
